title: botrychium tunux
intro: Botrychium lunatum, also known as Lunariale or Moonwort, is a type of fern that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Botrychium lunatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
